---
name: task_next
description: Prompt used manually by the developer
---

Using ~/runner directory as your replication reference and ~/spec/README.md as your specification source of truth...

EXECUTE the next "Pending" task from PLAN.md. Your workspace for this application is "~/runtime-js".

RUN all the existing tests.

DON'T ASK for answers. When dealing with ambigous issues, take the simpler path.

FOLLOW the PLAN, the SPEC and the Go runner implementation.

NEVER edit files in the "~/spec" or "~/runner" folder.

MARK the task status as "Complete ✅" in the PLAN.md file when you're done developing and testing.

STOP only when you completed and marked the task complete. I therefore authorize automatic executions of any tool and command necessary to complete the task. DO NOT INTERRUPT your work.
